title: pectis caymanensis var. caymanensis
intro: Pectis caymanensis var. caymanensis is a perennial plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae) and native to the Cayman Islands. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The plant has been known to offer various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and providing relief from fever and pain. The herbal preparations of Pectis caymanensis var. caymanensis include teas, infusions, and topical applications, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
